name: zeusi/json-schema-extractor
description: Modular JSON Schema generator for PHP DTOs, extracting native types, PHPDoc, validation constraints, and serialization metadata

suggest.phpdocumentor/reflection-docblock: Allows extracting DocBlock text metadata and PHPDoc types using PhpDocumentorEnricher
suggest.phpstan/phpdoc-parser: Allows extracting high-precision PHPDoc types using PhpStanEnricher
suggest.symfony/error-handler: Allows SymfonySerializerStrategy to map FlattenException values like Symfony's ProblemNormalizer
suggest.symfony/serializer: Allows using SymfonySerializerStrategy for #[SerializedName], serialization groups, name converters, and known normalizers
suggest.symfony/translation-contracts: Allows SymfonySerializerStrategy to map TranslatableInterface values like Symfony's TranslatableNormalizer
suggest.symfony/uid: Allows SymfonySerializerStrategy to map Symfony Uid values like Symfony's UidNormalizer
suggest.symfony/validator: Allows extracting JSON Schema constraints from Symfony Validator metadata using SymfonyValidationEnricher
